---
title: "Session 02 teaching notes: Excel 2"
session_id: session-02
event_id: null
---

## Session 2 — Lookups and tables

::: {.callout-note title="Overview"}
- Take-home exercises to discuss: ...
:::

Session 2:

- Besprechung Hausaufgaben
- Vlookup limitation: lookup-column must be first, if we switch, it no longer works -> need for xlookup
- p. christmas gift, grading: homework.
- tables p.36 - Bikesales.xlsx. gemeinsam machen
- Wichtig: p. 43 (auch p.46): Totals / Subtotals funktion verstehen (immer Klausurrelevant) -> Bei subtotals werden Funktionsnamen über die Nummern kodiert!

p.47: Referenzen: egal wo die Tabelle steht

PR: Session 2 typically ends at 46.

## Exercises

| Slide(s) | Exercise       | Summary                                                                                                        | Files              | In-class vs take-home |
| -------: | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------ | --------------------- |
|       32 | Bar sales      | Retrieve drink prices and calculate sales amounts.                                                             |                    |                       |
|       34 | Client lookup  | Automatically retrieve a client’s name and address from their client number.                                   | `Clients.xlsx`     |                       |
|       35 | Christmas gift | Assign gifts and packaging based on each customer’s status.                                                    |                    |                       |
|       36 | Course grading | Calculate final course grades from three tests and three homework assignments.                                 |                    |                       |
|    51–52 | Excel tables   | Convert and manipulate a sales table; calculate structured-reference metrics, regional summaries, and a chart. | `Sales_Table.xlsx` |                       |



<!--
    ## Session overview

    - **Focus:** Excel
    - **Session title:** Excel 1
    - **Coverage target:** TBD

    ## Before class

    - [ ] Review the session slides/materials.
    - [ ] Prepare files, datasets, and examples.
    - [ ] Note any announcements or reminders.

    ## Timing record

    Use this table while preparing or after teaching to record the actual timing.

    | Planned time | Actual time | Topic/activity | Notes for next time |
    |---|---|---|---|
    | 0--10 min |  | Setup / recap |  |
    | 10--30 min |  | Main input |  |
    | 30--60 min |  | Guided practice |  |
    | 60--80 min |  | Independent practice / questions |  |
    | 80--90 min |  | Wrap-up |  |

    ## Notes during class

    - TBD

    ## Follow-up

    - [ ] Update examples or instructions.
    - [ ] Record common questions.
    - [ ] Add reminders for the next session.
-->
